paragraphs: The Zhang Research Group at Institute of Biopharmaceutical and Health Engineering (iBHE) at Tsinghua University is focused on the live-cell pharmaceutical engineering, with a major emphasis on the design and preparation of functional biomaterials and drug delivery technology for complementary interactions to generate a "smart" system, interesting in neutrophil engneering, surface engineering of bacteria, and AI for formulation.

announcements.title: Programmed oral delivery of peptide therapeutics for multiorgan targeting in metabolic disorders of hyperglycemia and hyperuricemia
announcements.authors: Junyu Liu, Xupu Xing, Chang Wen, Haihong Chen, Wei Li, Yuqing Huang, Yi Wang, Xin-Hui Xing, Can Yang Zhang*

announcements.title: Surface decoration of bacteria generates robust living therapeutics for improved ulcerative colitis therapy
announcements.authors: Junyu Liu, Zhihao Fang, Xiaobin Li, Xiaopeng Zhang, Yun Chen, Fujia Kou, Long Huang, Huanxian Yang, Yilin Zheng, Yuqing Huang, Yi Wang, Xueqing Qiu, Jun Ge, Yong Qian*, Xin-Hui Xing* & Can Yang Zhang*

announcements.title: De Novo Developmet of Bioresponsive Nanoparticles with Antimicrobial Activity to Treat Bacterial Infections
announcements.authors: Liang Zhao#, Junyu Liu#, Xiaobin Li#, Xupu Xing#, Yiting Li, Yun Chen, Yuqing Huang, Yi Wang, Shilong Zhang, Xin Dong Guo, Ruirui Qiao, Shun-ichiro Ogura, Takeharu Tsuge, Xin-Hui Xing, Can Yang Zhang*

announcements.title: Another Gold! Gold Prize at the 2026 Evaluations Days
announcements.description: Our team's project "Intelligent Manufacturing System for Colon-Targeted Oral Probiotics" won the gold prize in the online participation category of the 2026 Evaluations Days. Congratulations to He Yumao, Huang Yuqing, Liu Junyu, Gao Dan, Zhang Xiaopeng, and Prof. Zhang!

announcements.title: Award-Winning at the 4th iBHE International Graduate Forum
announcements.description: Congratulations to our team for winning multiple awards at the 4th Biopharmaceutical and Health Engineering Cup International Graduate Forum of iBHE — Best Poster Award (Xiaobin Li & Xiaotong Zhao), Innovation and Entrepreneurship Award (Yiting Li & Xiaotong Zhao), and Best Oral Presentation Award (Wanyue Zhang).

announcements.title: Wanyue Zhang Receives the Academic Innovation Scholarship
announcements.description: Congratulations to Wanyue Zhang on being awarded the 学术新风奖学金 (Academic Innovation Scholarship) for her outstanding academic performance in the 2025-2026 academic year.
